Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Understand the Goal The user wants a response based on a provided scenario The scenario includes a database schema for an insurance claim process a specific Temporal Profile Model and some initial observations about anomalies Task Requirements 1 Identify anomalies 2 Generate hypotheses 3 Propose SQL queries

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Input Data Schema claims adjusters claim_events Process Flow R A E P N C Temporal Profile Model R-A normal R-E normal R-P anomaly low stdev A-C anomaly fast E-N anomaly too fast P-N anomaly long delay N-C normal

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Drafting Section 1 Anomalies Identification R-P Mean 25 hours StDev 1 hour looks robotic P-N Mean 7 days huge delay A-C Mean 2 hours skipping steps E-N Mean 5 minutes skipping P

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Drafting Section 2 Hypotheses Generation Hypothesis for R-P Low Variance Batch processing strict SLA Hypothesis for P-N Long Delay Notification backlog third-party mail Hypothesis for A-C E-N Fast-tracking low-value claims data corruption auto-approval

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Drafting Section 3 SQL Verification Queries Self-join claim_events calculate deltas using EXTRACT EPOCH Query ideas P-N outliers E-N rapid check missing P A-C speedsters R-P rigidity histogram Group by resource adjuster

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Self-Correction Review during drafting Critique ZETA factor use Avg 2 StDev table names match Refinement emphasize low STDEV automation Final Polish SQL self-join comments PostgreSQL syntax
